## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go vet ./...`, and `go test ./...` pass
- [ ] Code is `gofmt`-ed
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` if user-facing
- [ ] Added/updated an ADR in `docs/adr/` if this makes a design decision
- [ ] Did not change the locked `store` interface (or it was discussed in an issue)
